CustomField.description: Date the member's most recent membership was last active (typically the End Date of the most-recently-ended Membership Asset). Read by PromoCodeValidator when a Join-eligible promo code has Min_Months_Since_Last_Active__c set. Population is owned by the membership lifecycle (Flow on Asset or similar) and is out of scope for this object's field definition.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-maintained from the most recently ended Membership Asset. Used by promo codes that have a lookback requirement on prior membership.
CustomField.label: Last Active Membership Date
